method: compiled real questions and inspected plan fields + runtime instantiation contracts

phase4_actor_policy.emitted_example: Senate confirmation Q: production_actor_policy IS named
phase4_actor_policy.chain_break: conditional: emitted for clearly-strategic Qs; the 75% gap is Qs where the compiler does not identify a strategic actor or name the operator
phase4_actor_policy.fix: requirement-inference ensures actor-required Qs get an actor operator + a decision_opportunity event
phase4_actor_policy.acceptance_test: activation recall >=95% on actor-required labels; false<=10% on actor-free controls

phase6_registry.chain_break: compiler rarely names a registry mechanism operator for general Qs; falls back to generic_outcome_prior
phase6_registry.runtime_operator: registry families registered; fire iff named
phase6_registry.fix: map causal process -> applicable registry family + operator; add to accepted_mechanisms

phase7_nonlinear.chain_break: operators runtime-registered but compiler never names them; no matching scheduled event
phase7_nonlinear.fix: detect nonlinear causal structure -> add nonlinear operator + a matching event
phase7_nonlinear.acceptance_test: recall>=95% on nonlinear-required; differs from matched linear comparator in >=90%

phase9_populations.emitted_example: Senate Q emitted 2 populations; economic Qs emitted 0
phase9_populations.chain_break: EMISSION is question-dependent AND no operator aggregates population state into the terminal (no causal consumer)
phase9_populations.fix: emit PopulationSpec for aggregate-behavior Qs + a population-aggregation consumer that affects the terminal
phase9_populations.acceptance_test: emit>=95% on population-required; removing heterogeneity changes terminal in >=90%

phase9_networks.chain_break: relations added to world.network but distinct semantic layers are not modeled and no layer-specific causal consumer exists
phase9_networks.fix: emit typed multilayer layers (communication/exposure/trust/influence/authority/alliance) with layer-specific consumers
phase9_networks.acceptance_test: multilayer emit>=95% on network-required; layer rewiring changes terminal in >=90%

phase10_institutions.emitted_example: Senate Q emitted senate+judiciary_committee with rules
phase10_institutions.chain_break: ROOT CAUSE: rule kinds emitted (voting_rule/confirmation_process/committee_vote) are NOT in EXECUTABLE_RULE_KINDS {budget,capacity,deadline,decision_right,eligibility,procedure,quorum} -> materialize DROPS them -> empty RuleSystem (ornamental). AND no institution_action operator named + no institutional_action event carrying an InstitutionRuntime.
phase10_institutions.fix: normalize rule kinds to the executable set; add institution_action operator + institutional_action event with an InstitutionRuntime
phase10_institutions.acceptance_test: executable rules >0 on institution-required; institution StateDelta in >=90%; removing changes terminal in >=90%

phase11_recompilation.chain_break: runs on all executions but only fires on genuine surprise; not validated on adversarial shock/migration scenarios
phase11_recompilation.fix: adversarial shock corpus with injected structural changes; verify trigger->revision->migration->continuation
phase11_recompilation.acceptance_test: trigger recall>=90% on injected shocks; false<=10% on stable controls; migration integrity>=98%
